key_facts: Falta is an assembly constituency in South 24 Parganas district, West Bengal, India
TMC (Trinamool Congress) is the ruling party in West Bengal led by Mamata Banerjee
Re-polls in India are ordered by the Election Commission under Section 58/58A of the Representation of the People Act, 1951
Legal challenges to re-poll orders in West Bengal fall under the jurisdiction of Calcutta High Court (Article 226) with appeal to Supreme Court (Article 136 SLP)
Indian courts generally exercise restraint in interfering with ECI operational decisions on re-polls
